psalm-106-1.prayer: Lord, I give thanks to You because You are good. Thank You that Your lovingkindness endures forever.

psalm-106-2.verse:
Who can speak of the mighty deeds of the Lord,
  Or can show forth all His praise?
psalm-106-2.prayer: Father, Your mighty deeds are beyond what I can fully declare. Help my life praise You with humility and awe.

psalm-106-3.verse:
How blessed are those who keep justice,
  Who practice righteousness at all times!
psalm-106-3.prayer: Lord, bless me with a heart that practices justice and righteousness in every season.

psalm-106-4.verse:
Remember me, O Lord, in Your favor toward Your people;
  Visit me with Your salvation,
psalm-106-4.prayer: Father, remember me with Your favor and visit me with Your salvation.

psalm-106-5.verse:
That I may see the prosperity of Your chosen ones,
  That I may rejoice in the gladness of Your nation,
  That I may glory with Your inheritance.
psalm-106-5.prayer: Lord, let me see the goodness You show Your people and rejoice in the inheritance of those who belong to You.

psalm-106-6.verse:
We have sinned like our fathers,
  We have committed iniquity, we have behaved wickedly.
psalm-106-6.prayer: Father, forgive me for the ways I have sinned, failed, or followed the wrong path. Lead me back to Your mercy.

psalm-106-7.prayer: Lord, keep me from forgetting Your wonders or rebelling against Your goodness. Teach me to remember Your faithfulness.

psalm-106-8.verse:
Nevertheless He saved them for the sake of His name,
  That He might make His power known.
psalm-106-8.prayer: Father, thank You for saving according to Your name and making Your power known.

psalm-106-9.verse:
Thus He rebuked the Red Sea and it dried up,
  And He led them through the deeps, as through the wilderness.
psalm-106-9.prayer: Lord, You made a way through the sea. Help me trust that You can lead me through impossible places.

psalm-106-10.verse:
So He saved them from the hand of the one who hated them,
  And redeemed them from the hand of the enemy.
psalm-106-10.prayer: Father, redeem me from what is too strong for me and rescue me by Your power.

psalm-106-11.verse:
The waters covered their adversaries;
  Not one of them was left.
psalm-106-11.prayer: Lord, thank You that no enemy or obstacle is greater than Your deliverance.

psalm-106-12.verse:
Then they believed His words;
  They sang His praise.
psalm-106-12.prayer: Father, help me believe Your words and respond with praise.

psalm-106-13.verse:
They quickly forgot His works;
  They did not wait for His counsel,
psalm-106-13.prayer: Lord, keep me from quickly forgetting Your works. Teach me to wait for Your counsel.

psalm-106-14.verse:
But craved intensely in the wilderness,
  And tempted God in the desert.
psalm-106-14.prayer: Father, guard my heart from selfish cravings and from testing You in seasons of need.

psalm-106-15.verse:
So He gave them their request,
  But sent a wasting disease among them.
psalm-106-15.prayer: Lord, teach me to desire Your will more than my own way. Let my soul be satisfied in You.

psalm-106-16.verse:
When they became envious of Moses in the camp,
  And of Aaron, the holy one of the Lord,
psalm-106-16.prayer: Father, protect me from envy, comparison, and resentment toward those You have called.

psalm-106-17.verse:
The earth opened and swallowed up Dathan,
  And engulfed the company of Abiram.
psalm-106-17.prayer: Lord, humble every rebellious thought in me and lead me into obedience.

psalm-106-18.verse:
And a fire blazed up in their company;
  The flame consumed the wicked.
psalm-106-18.prayer: Father, remove what is sinful, destructive, or dishonoring from my life.

psalm-106-19.verse:
They made a calf in Horeb
  And worshiped a molten image.
psalm-106-19.prayer: Lord, keep me from creating idols or replacing You with anything made by human hands.

psalm-106-20.verse:
Thus they exchanged their glory
  For the image of an ox that eats grass.
psalm-106-20.prayer: Father, guard me from exchanging Your glory for things that cannot save or satisfy.

psalm-106-21.verse:
They forgot God their Savior,
  Who had done great things in Egypt,
psalm-106-21.prayer: Lord, help me never forget You, my Savior, and the great things You have done.

psalm-106-22.verse:
Wonders in the land of Ham
  And awesome things by the Red Sea.
psalm-106-22.prayer: Father, remind me of Your wonders, power, and faithfulness when my heart grows distracted.

psalm-106-23.verse:
Therefore He said that He would destroy them,
  Had not Moses His chosen one stood in the breach before Him,
  To turn away His wrath from destroying them.
psalm-106-23.prayer: Lord, thank You for mercy that stands between judgment and destruction. Teach me to intercede with compassion.

psalm-106-24.verse:
Then they despised the pleasant land;
  They did not believe in His word,
psalm-106-24.prayer: Father, keep me from despising the good things You promise. Strengthen my faith in Your Word.

psalm-106-25.verse:
But grumbled in their tents;
  They did not listen to the voice of the Lord.
psalm-106-25.prayer: Lord, protect me from grumbling and unbelief. Help me obey Your voice with trust.

psalm-106-26.verse:
Therefore He swore to them
  That He would cast them down in the wilderness,
psalm-106-26.prayer: Father, teach me that disobedience has consequences and help me walk in reverence.

psalm-106-27.verse:
And that He would cast their seed among the nations
  And scatter them in the lands.
psalm-106-27.prayer: Lord, preserve future generations by Your mercy and help my life leave a faithful legacy.

psalm-106-28.verse:
They joined themselves also to Baal-peor,
  And ate sacrifices offered to the dead.
psalm-106-28.prayer: Father, keep me from joining myself to anything that dishonors You or leads my heart away from Your truth.

psalm-106-29.verse:
Thus they provoked Him to anger with their deeds,
  And the plague broke out among them.
psalm-106-29.prayer: Lord, forgive the ways my actions grieve You. Lead me quickly back to repentance and faithfulness.

psalm-106-30.verse:
Then Phinehas stood up and interposed,
  And so the plague was stayed.
psalm-106-30.prayer: Father, give me courage to stand for righteousness when compromise surrounds me.

psalm-106-31.verse:
And it was reckoned to him for righteousness,
  To all generations forever.
psalm-106-31.prayer: Lord, let faithfulness and obedience be remembered in my life as a testimony to Your grace.

psalm-106-32.verse:
They also provoked Him to wrath at the waters of Meribah,
  So that it went hard with Moses on their account;
psalm-106-32.prayer: Father, keep my heart from anger, impatience, and unbelief in difficult places.

psalm-106-33.verse:
Because they were rebellious against His Spirit,
  He spoke rashly with his lips.
psalm-106-33.prayer: Lord, guard my spirit and my words so I do not speak rashly when I am frustrated.

psalm-106-34.verse:
They did not destroy the peoples,
  As the Lord commanded them,
psalm-106-34.prayer: Father, help me obey fully and not compromise with what You have called me to remove.

psalm-106-35.verse:
But they mingled with the nations
  And learned their practices,
psalm-106-35.prayer: Lord, protect me from blending into patterns that pull me away from Your holiness.

psalm-106-36.verse:
And served their idols,
  Which became a snare to them.
psalm-106-36.prayer: Father, keep idols from becoming a snare in my life. Teach me to worship You alone.

psalm-106-37.verse: They even sacrificed their sons and their daughters to the demons,
psalm-106-37.prayer: Lord, protect families and future generations from destructive choices and false worship.

psalm-106-38.verse:
And shed innocent blood,
  The blood of their sons and their daughters,
  Whom they sacrificed to the idols of Canaan;
  And the land was polluted with the blood.
psalm-106-38.prayer: Father, cleanse what has been polluted by sin and restore reverence for life, truth, and holiness.

psalm-106-39.verse:
Thus they became unclean in their practices,
  And played the harlot in their deeds.
psalm-106-39.prayer: Lord, purify my heart from unfaithfulness and bring me back into faithful devotion to You.

psalm-106-40.verse:
Therefore the anger of the Lord was kindled against His people
  And He abhorred His inheritance.
psalm-106-40.prayer: Father, help me take sin seriously and understand how deeply rebellion grieves Your heart.

psalm-106-41.verse:
Then He gave them into the hand of the nations,
  And those who hated them ruled over them.
psalm-106-41.prayer: Lord, when consequences come, use them to bring correction, humility, and restoration.

psalm-106-42.verse:
Their enemies also oppressed them,
  And they were subdued under their power.
psalm-106-42.prayer: Father, deliver me from anything that oppresses, controls, or weakens my obedience to You.

psalm-106-43.prayer: Lord, thank You for delivering again and again. Keep me from returning to rebellion after receiving mercy.

psalm-106-44.verse:
Nevertheless He looked upon their distress
  When He heard their cry;
psalm-106-44.prayer: Father, thank You for seeing distress and hearing the cry of those who call upon You.

psalm-106-45.verse:
And He remembered His covenant for their sake,
  And relented according to the greatness of His lovingkindness.
psalm-106-45.prayer: Lord, remember Your covenant and show compassion according to Your abundant lovingkindness.

psalm-106-46.verse:
He also made them objects of compassion
  In the presence of all their captors.
psalm-106-46.prayer: Father, give favor, mercy, and compassion even in difficult places.

psalm-106-47.verse:
Save us, O Lord our God,
  And gather us from among the nations,
  To give thanks to Your holy name
  And glory in Your praise.
psalm-106-47.prayer: Lord, save me and gather me close to You so I may give thanks to Your holy name.

psalm-106-48.verse:
Blessed be the Lord, the God of Israel,
  From everlasting even to everlasting.
  And let all the people say, “Amen.”
  Praise the Lord!
psalm-106-48.prayer: Father, blessed be Your name forever. Let all my life say, Amen, and praise You.

psalm-106-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for Your goodness, mercy, patience, and covenant faithfulness. Forgive me when I forget Your works, resist Your voice, or turn toward things that cannot satisfy. Teach me to remember Your salvation, walk in obedience, reject every idol, and trust Your mercy through every season. May my life give thanks to Your holy name and praise You forever.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
